name: Pumpkin Swirl Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pie crust for a filled one-crust pie using a 9-inch pie pan. Flute the edge.
2. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
3. In a small bowl, beat the cream cheese until light and fluffy with an electric mixer on medium speed.
4. Gradually add half the corn syrup and vanilla, beating until smooth.
5. Spread the mixture evenly over the bottom of the pie crust-lined pan.
6. In the same bowl, combine pumpkin, eggs, remaining corn syrup, evaporated milk, sugar, pumpkin pie spice, and salt. Beat until smooth.
7. Carefully pour the pumpkin mixture over the cream cheese mixture in the pie shell.
8. Using a knife or small spatula, swirl the mixture to create a marbled effect.
9. Bake at 325°F for 45 to 50 minutes, or until a knife inserted halfway between the edge and center comes out clean.
10. Allow the pie to cool completely on a wire rack before storing in the refrigerator.
